vocabulary.customer_due_diligence: Identifying and verifying customers and their circumstances (CDD/KYC/EDD).
vocabulary.beneficial_ownership: Identifying the natural persons who ultimately own or control a customer.
vocabulary.risk_based_approach: Assessing and mitigating money-laundering and terrorism-financing risk proportionately.
vocabulary.amlctf_program: The governance, policies, and controls a reporting entity must maintain.
vocabulary.suspicious_matter_reporting: Reporting suspicions to the financial intelligence unit (SMR/SAR).
vocabulary.threshold_transaction_reporting: Reporting cash or other transactions at or above a set value.
vocabulary.record_keeping: Retaining prescribed records for prescribed periods.
vocabulary.tipping_off: Restrictions on disclosing that a report has been or may be made (disclosure offences).
vocabulary.designated_services: Activities that bring an entity into the regime, including the Tranche 2 sectors.
vocabulary.enrolment_registration: The obligation to enrol or register with the regulator.
vocabulary.correspondent_banking: Obligations specific to cross-border correspondent banking relationships.
vocabulary.politically_exposed_persons: Heightened measures for higher-risk public-office holders (PEPs).
vocabulary.sanctions_prohibitions: Prohibited dealings with designated persons/entities or controlled assets.
vocabulary.asset_freezing: Freezing of, and the prohibition on dealing with, controlled assets.
vocabulary.designation_criteria: The legal criteria for designating or listing a person or entity.
vocabulary.un_and_autonomous_sanctions: The UN and autonomous sanctions regimes and their relationship.
vocabulary.enforcement_and_offences: Consequences of contravention; civil penalties and offences.
vocabulary.supervisory_architecture: FATF mutual evaluation; national regulators (AUSTRAC; DFAT) and their functions.
vocabulary.scope_and_application: Who and what conduct the instrument reaches; extraterritorial application.
vocabulary.definitions_and_interpretation: Defined terms and rules of interpretation.
